name: Quick Mix Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks in a medium mixing bowl.
2. Add milk and vegetable oil to the beaten yolks.
3. Gradually add the Quick Bread Mix, stirring until the mixture is smooth.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
6. Pour about 1/3 cup of batter into a hot, lightly oiled waffle iron.
7. Bake for about 5 minutes or until steaming stops.
8. Repeat the process with the remaining batter.
9. Yield: 12 (4-inch) waffles
